title: dianthus cyri
intro: Dianthus cyri, also known as Kashmir pink or Dianthus caryophyllus, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Dianthus cyri include reducing fever, soothing coughs, and treating digestive issues. It is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in essential oils and topical creams.
